box_guarantees._source: pokemoncard.co.kr/card/417 product metadata + altema.jp / Japanese community estimates. Box model: K 1, CHR 3, RR 4-5, RRR 2-3, SR+ 1-2; CSR about 10%, HR about 20%, UR about 10%. Korean official pull rates are unpublished.

_notes: S9a. Korean official card/product metadata from pokemoncard.co.kr. Pull-rate model uses Japanese community estimates; Korean official pull rates are private.
